scripts.db:deploy: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma generate
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/api && npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register prisma/seed.ts
scripts.seed: cd apps/api && npx ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register prisma/seed.ts
scripts.deploy: pnpm install && pnpm build:api && pnpm build:web && pm2 restart serene-api serene-web
scripts.deploy:migrate: pnpm install && pnpm db:deploy && pnpm build:api && pnpm build:web && pm2 restart serene-api serene-web
